examples.name: Single-line totals format with Available/Used/Remaining summary and basic interfaces
examples.input:
Available:1170.0(w)  Used:212.2(w)  Remaining:957.8(w)

Interface Admin  Oper       Power   Device              Class Max
                            (Watts)
--------- ------ ---------- ------- ------------------- ----- ----
Gi0/1     auto   off        0.0     n/a                 n/a   30.0
Gi0/2     auto   on         6.4     IP Phone 8945       2     30.0
Gi0/3     auto   on         6.4     IP Phone 8845       2     30.0
Gi0/4     auto   off        0.0     n/a                 n/a   30.0

examples.name: Single module with faulty port and Ieee PD device types
examples.input:
Module   Available     Used     Remaining
          (Watts)     (Watts)    (Watts)
------   ---------   --------   ---------
2          1440.0       75.8      1364.2
Interface Admin  Oper       Power   Device              Class Max
                            (Watts)
--------- ------ ---------- ------- ------------------- ----- ----
Gi2/0/21  auto   on         3.8     Ieee PD             1     30.0
Gi2/0/35  auto   on         6.0     Ieee PD             2     30.0
Gi2/0/36  auto   off        0.0     n/a                 n/a   30.0
Gi2/0/37  auto   off        0.0     n/a                 n/a   30.0
Gi2/0/38  auto   faulty     0.0     n/a                 n/a   30.0

examples.name: IOS 12 with FastEthernet interfaces and 15.4W max power
examples.input:
Available:370.0(w)  Used:55.6(w)  Remaining:314.4(w)

Interface Admin  Oper       Power   Device              Class Max
                            (Watts)
--------- ------ ---------- ------- ------------------- ----- ----
Fa0/1     auto   off        0.0     n/a                 n/a   15.4
Fa0/2     auto   on         6.3     IP Phone 7962       2     15.4
Fa0/4     auto   on         6.3     Ieee PD             2     15.4
Fa0/5     auto   off        0.0     n/a                 n/a   15.4
Fa0/21    auto   on         15.4    C9115AXI-B          4     15.4
Fa0/22    auto   on         15.4    Ieee PD             4     15.4
Fa0/23    auto   off        0.0     n/a                 n/a   15.4
